failed_attempts.sql:
WITH pasta_posts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.id AS publication_id, 
        p.profile_id
    FROM publication p
    WHERE p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'pasta')
),
restaurant_candidates AS (
    SELECT 
        pr.id AS profile_id
    FROM profile pr
    WHERE pr.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'restaurante | restaurant')
      AND (pr.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', '"Balneário Camboriú"'))
)
SELECT 
    pp.publication_id
FROM pasta_posts pp
JOIN restaurant_candidates rc ON pp.profile_id = rc.profile_id
ORDER BY pp.publication_id DESC
LIMIT 10;

        p.id AS publication_id, 
        p.profile_id
    FROM publication p
    WHERE p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('portuguese', 'pasta')

)
SELECT 
    pp.publication_id
FROM pasta_posts pp
JOIN restaurant_candidates rc ON pp.profile_id = rc.profile_id

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    p.id AS publication_id
FROM publication p
JOIN profile pr ON p.profile_id = pr.id
WHERE pr.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('portuguese', 'restaurante & balneario & camboriu')
  AND p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('portuguese', 'pasta')
ORDER BY p.published_at DESC
LIMIT 10
